texto: Any DayWiped clean by times stumbling gateReflecting toward my inner hateI see sweet life spring anewI touch a birth with what I doAs the dawn's warming raysMelt morning's beguiling hazeI realize the truth of liesA new year's hope with spirit fliesI wake the same as every dayI speak the words I always sayI see the sky the same againAnd now know change comes only whenA choice is made in spite of timeA goal is set without a chimeChoice renders void the voiceTo hearken in a New Year's choice
explicacao: Citação de Roberto Vecchi sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Any DayWiped clean by times stumbling gateReflecting toward my inner hateI see sweet life spring …” articula reflexao, healing-the-emotional-self, inspirational-living em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e mudanca.
